本頁整合 Rasburicase 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment and prophylaxis of acute hyperuricaemia, in order to prevent acute renal failure, in adults, children and adolescents (aged 0 to 17 years) with haematological malignancy with a high tumour...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>obsolete hyperuricemia (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>hypouricemia, renal（100.0%）</li>
<li>hypoxanthine guanine phosphoribosyltransferase partial deficiency（100.0%）</li>
<li>hepatic porphyria（100.0%）</li>
<li>primitive portal vein thrombosis（100.0%）</li>
<li>hepatoportal sclerosis（100.0%）</li>
<li>hepatopulmonary syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>early-onset familial noncirrhotic portal hypertension（100.0%）</li>
<li>idiopathic copper-associated cirrhosis（100.0%）</li>
<li>renal tubular acidosis（99.8%）</li>
<li>disorder of phenylalanine metabolism（99.8%）</li>
<li>disorder of tyrosine metabolism（99.7%）</li>
<li>teratogenic Pierre Robin syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>glycogen storage disease due to hepatic glycogen synthase deficiency（99.6%）</li>
<li>Lesch-Nyhan syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>tetrahydrobiopterin-responsive hyperphenylalaninemia/phenylketonuria（99.5%）</li>
<li>G6PD deficiency（99.0%）</li>
<li>inborn disorder of gamma-aminobutyric acid metabolism（97.7%）</li>
<li>inborn disorder of ornithine metabolism（97.7%）</li>
<li>inborn disorder of amino acid and other organic acid metabolism（97.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
